title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
